title: Describe-First Project Starter
description: Start a new project by describing the experience you want to create — before asking for any code.

variables.name: PROJECT_DESCRIPTION
variables.description: Describe what you're building in one sentence
variables.example: a personal portfolio page that shows my name, three projects, and my contact info

variables.name: FEATURE_1
variables.example: A hero section with my name and a short tagline

variables.name: FEATURE_2
variables.example: A grid of project cards with title, description, and a link

variables.name: FEATURE_3
variables.example: A contact section with my email address

variables.name: UX_DESCRIPTION
variables.description: Describe how it should feel to use
variables.example: Clean and professional. Like a design portfolio, not a resume.

variables.name: STYLE_DESCRIPTION
variables.example: Dark background with purple accent color

exampleOutput: Here is your index.html with all three sections...
author: Krosebrook
